x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Data classification prevents Now Assist from including sensitive data (PII, PCI, PHI) in AI prompts and summaries. Without data classification, Now Assist may inadvertently expose sensitive information in AI-generated responses.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate the Data Classification plugin and configure classification rules via dl_class_list.do. Define sensitivity labels for tables containing PII/PCI/PHI. Data classification is a compliance prerequisite for Now Assist in regulated environments.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cf1
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Data classification prevents Now Assist from including sensitive data (PII, PCI, PHI) in AI prompts and summaries. Without data classification, Now Assist may inadvertently expose sensitive information in AI-generated responses.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Data Classification Enabled</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Check sys_scope for data classification plugin
    var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_scope');
    gr.addQuery('scope', 'CONTAINS', 'data_classification');
    gr.addQuery('active', true);
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();
    var active = gr.next();

    // Fallback: check via plugin name
    if (!active) {
        var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_plugins');
        ga.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', 'Data Classification');
        ga.addQuery('active', true);
        ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
        ga.query();
        active = ga.next() && parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) >= 1;
    }

    if (active) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: 'Data Classification is active',
            finding: 'Data Classification is active. Sensitive data controls are in place — Now Assist will respect classification labels when generating AI summaries and search results.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: 'Data Classification not found or inactive',
            finding: 'Data Classification is not active. In regulated environments, data classification is required to prevent Now Assist from including PII/PCI/PHI in AI prompts and generated summaries. Assess whether this is required for your compliance posture.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>PLATFORM</module>
<number>CHK0006119</number>
<order>150</order>
<remediation_guidance>Activate the Data Classification plugin and configure classification rules via dl_class_list.do. Define sensitivity labels for tables containing PII/PCI/PHI. Data classification is a compliance prerequisite for Now Assist in regulated environments.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cf1</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
